# hub.sh — Hub File Aggregation

Generates `generated/all-packages.nix`, which is the single file that
NixOS imports to pull in all Nixorcist-managed packages.

---

## regenerate_hub

Reads every `.nix` file from `generated/.modules/` and writes:

```nix
# generated/all-packages.nix  — auto-generated by Nixorcist, do not edit
{ ... }:
{
  imports = [
    ./.modules/firefox.nix
    ./.modules/git.nix
    ./.modules/python3.nix
    # ...
  ];
}
```

The number of imported modules is reported:
```
  ✓ Hub regenerated (42 modules imported)
```

---

## Notes

- The hub is re-generated after every successful transaction and at the
  start of every rebuild.
- If `generated/.modules/` is empty, the hub is written with an empty
  `imports` list so `nixos-rebuild` still evaluates cleanly.
- Never edit `all-packages.nix` by hand — it is overwritten on every
  `nixorcist hub` call.
